markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 724. Implied Consent
##### § 724.002 — Applicability

The provisions of this chapter that apply to suspension of a license for refusal to submit to the taking of a specimen (Sections 724.013 (Prohibition on Taking Specimen if Person Refuses; Exception) , 724.015 (Information Provided by Officer Before Requesting Specimen; Statement of Consent) , and 724.048 (Relationship of Administrative Proceeding to Criminal Proceeding) and Subchapters C and D) apply only to a person arrested for an offense involving the operation of a motor vehicle or watercraft powered with an engine having a manufacturer’s rating of 50 horsepower or above.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 444, Sec. 7, eff. Sept. 1, 2001.*
